app.name: ccstatusline
app.one_liner: A highly customizable terminal status line formatter for Claude Code CLI that displays real-time metrics like token usage, git status, and model info.

screens.name: Status Line Display
screens.purpose: Render real-time telemetry widgets in the terminal status bar during Claude Code sessions.
primary_actions: Observe current model and thinking effort
View token usage and speed metrics

rust_commands.name: configure_widget
rust_commands.purpose: Adjust widget settings such as speed window duration or skills display mode using the 'w' key in the status line interface.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add widget configuration interface triggered by 'w' key
week 1: Implement core status line rendering with basic token and git widgets
week 1: Integrate Anthropic usage API with HTTPS_PROXY support
acceptance_tests: macOS user with OAuth token in credentials file (not keychain) sees correct session usage after fix.
User can see real-time input/output/total token speed in status line with configurable window (0–120s).
